description: Sync UI Refresh — Pages don't update after sync downloads new data from Google Drive. Add OnDataMerged event and page subscriptions so synced entries appear without manual refresh. Add status notification for sync completion.

userStories.title: Add OnDataMerged event to SyncService
userStories.description: As a developer, I need SyncService to fire an event when sync has downloaded and saved new entries locally, so pages can subscribe and refresh their data.
acceptanceCriteria: ISyncService exposes 'event Action? OnDataMerged'
SyncService fires OnDataMerged after ReplaceAllAsync() completes, only when MergeResult.LocalChanged is true
OnDataMerged fires AFTER OnDataChanged re-subscription is restored in the finally block
OnDataMerged is NOT fired when sync finds no local changes needed
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Home page refreshes entries after sync merge
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Home page to automatically show new entries from other devices after sync completes, so I don't have to refresh the page.
acceptanceCriteria: Home.razor subscribes to SyncService.OnDataMerged in OnInitializedAsync
On merge event, re-fetches entries via DiaryService.GetAllAsync() and updates the displayed list with the same ordering
Uses InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged) pattern for thread-safe UI update
Unsubscribes from OnDataMerged in Dispose() — add @implements IDisposable if not already present
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Calendar page refreshes after sync merge
userStories.description: As a user, I want the Calendar page to show synced entries without a page refresh.
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar.razor subscribes to SyncService.OnDataMerged in OnInitializedAsync
On merge event, re-fetches diary entries and re-renders calendar data
Uses InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged) pattern for thread-safe UI update
Unsubscribes from OnDataMerged in Dispose() — add @implements IDisposable if not already present
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

Uses InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged) pattern for thread-safe UI update

On merge event, re-fetches entry data
Uses InvokeAsync(StateHasChanged) pattern for thread-safe UI update

Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Show snackbar notification when sync downloads new data
userStories.description: As a user, I want to see a brief notification when sync has pulled new data so I know my app is up to date across devices.
acceptanceCriteria: MainLayout.razor subscribes to SyncService.OnDataMerged
On merge event, shows a MudBlazor snackbar with message like 'Sync complete — new entries loaded'
Snackbar auto-dismisses after 3 seconds
Normal syncs with no new data do NOT show this snackbar (only OnDataMerged triggers it)
Unsubscribes from OnDataMerged in Dispose()
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill
